_comment: Example RIO audit ledger (WS6-ARTIFACTS-001). All hash values are cryptographically correct. Matches example_receipt_v2.json. Uses demo-service-token-for-testing-only as RIO_SERVICE_TOKEN.

execution_ledger._comment: Successful gate passage. receipt_hash matches example_receipt_v2.json for cross-reference.

post_execution_ledger._comment: Successful AI execution. parameters_hash links to execution_ledger row 1. HMAC computed with demo_service_token.

_hash_formulas.entry_hash: SHA-256(UTF-8_encode(action + '|' + agent + '|' + approver + '|' + executed_by + '|' + intent_id + '|' + parameters_hash + '|' + result + '|' + reason + '|' + receipt_hash + '|' + prev_hash + '|' + timestamp))
_hash_formulas.ledger_hash: SHA-256(UTF-8_encode(timestamp + '|' + approver + '|' + agent + '|' + executed_by + '|' + policy_result + '|' + parameters_hash + '|' + result_hash + '|' + prev_ledger_hash))
_hash_formulas.GENESIS_anchor: Literal ASCII string GENESIS — used as prev_hash and prev_ledger_hash for the first row in any chain
